title: Collall 250ml All Purpose Premium PVA Glue for Crafting - Fast-Drying Clear Glue Forms Strong, Lasting Bonds on Paper, Card, Wood, Fabric & More - Acid-Free, Water-Resistant Adhesive
features: STRONG, CLEAR BOND - This craft glue dries fast to form a crystal-clear, durable bond on a wide range of materials like paper, card, cork, wood, glass, and more.
MOISTURE RESISTANT - Formulated with solvents for reliable water resistance, this multipurpose PVA glue is ideal for projects that may be exposed to humidity or occasional splashes.
WITHSTANDS TEMPERATURES - Whether working with hot glue guns or in chilly environments, Collall all-purpose adhesive maintains its strong bond in the face of heat and cold.
QUICK-DRYING FORMULA - The smooth, easy-to-apply glue sets rapidly for faster completion of crafts, DIY fixes, and hobby projects without the long wait time of slower adhesives.
ACID-FREE ADHESIVE - With its safe, acid-free composition, this glue is well-suited for scrapbooks, photo albums, and memory books where material preservation is essential.
description: Product Description Crystal-Clear Finish Get professional-looking results every time with the Crafter’s Companion Collall All-Purpose Glue. Quick-drying to a transparent finish, this acid-free glue is ideal for universal use in the office, school and home crafts. With an easy-to-use applicator lid, Collall glue is a must-have item for any crafter - whether it’s for decoupage, paper crafts, modelling and more. Virtually Invisible Fixes Not just for crafting, this strong glue is water, heat and cold-resistant for quick DIY household repairs that last. Create incredibly strong bonds to paper, cork, wood, fabric, glass, ceramics, foam and plastics. Safety Warning Please note that solvent-based Collall all-purpose glue may damage painted or varnished objects. Suitable for children aged 6 and upwards under adult supervision. If you get this product on your clothing Please soak the area immediately only wet stains can be washed out.

specifications_table.Compatible Material: Ceramic, Fabric, Foam, Glass, Leather, Paper, Plastic, Wood
